translations.dashboard-intro: You can create polls and share them with your friends.
translations.dashboard-maybe-another-search: Maybe you can try another search?
translations.dashboard-maybe-create-poll: Maybe you should create a poll?
translations.dashboard-sign-in-text: You can now log into Apollusia with an account, so you can manage your polls on all your devices and continue to use these features:
translations.dashboard-sign-in-features: {$START_LIST_ITEM}Email notifications for your polls{$CLOSE_LIST_ITEM}{$START_LIST_ITEM}Push notifications for your polls{$CLOSE_LIST_ITEM}{$START_LIST_ITEM}Email notifications for your participations{$CLOSE_LIST_ITEM}
translations.dashboard-sign-in-extra-features-text: We will also add the following features built on accounts soon:
translations.dashboard-sign-in-info: {$START_ITALIC_TEXT}{$CLOSE_ITALIC_TEXT} Accounts are free, secure and forever optional. {$START_LINK}Learn more{$CLOSE_LINK}
translations.dashboard-claim-polls-1: It looks like some of your polls are not associated with your account yet.
translations.dashboard-claim-polls-2: To ensure you can always manage them on all your devices, you can claim them now.
translations.settings-user-id-description: Give this to your friends to let them add you to their polls as an admin.
translations.settings-email-description: Your email cannot be changed as a registered user.
translations.settings-alert-sign-in: You need to {$START_LINK}sign in{$CLOSE_LINK} to change your name and email.
translations.settings-enable-push-notifications: Enable Push Notifications for this Device
translations.settings-push-notifications-not-availabl: Push notifications are not available on this device or browser.
translations.settings-push-notifications-no-devices: No devices registered for push notifications.
translations.settings-push-notifications-alert-sign-i: You need to {$START_LINK}sign in{$CLOSE_LINK} to enable push notifications.
translations.settings-notifications-alert-sign-in: You need to {$START_LINK}sign in{$CLOSE_LINK} to change your notification preferences.
